---
title: "Partnerships"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Collaborating for better educational outcomes"
description: "Learn about chen.ist Academy's partnerships with educational institutions and industry leaders to build a stronger learning ecosystem."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:60vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Partnerships</h1>
    <p>Building a stronger educational ecosystem through collaboration with academia, industry, and community organizations.</p>
    <a href="#partner" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">Become a partner</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">4</div><div class="m-nl">Partnership models</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">3</div><div class="m-nl">Countries</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">15+</div><div class="m-nl">Years experience</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Focus</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PARTNERSHIP TYPES -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Partnership types</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four models designed for mutual impact.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="#partner" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Academic"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Academic</div><h3>Universities & Schools</h3><p>Joint certifications, research, student projects, and specialized workshops.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="#partner" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Industry"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Industry</div><h3>Companies & Orgs</h3><p>Internship pipelines, sponsored projects, guest lectures, and technology access.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="#partner" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Community"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Community</div><h3>NGOs & Nonprofits</h3><p>Scholarships, digital literacy, community workshops, and mentorship.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="#partner" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Research"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Research</div><h3>Labs & Innovation</h3><p>Joint research, advanced technologies, publications, and innovation incubation.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED PARTNERS -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Featured partners</h2>
    <p class="sub">Organizations we're proud to work with.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="University of Craiova">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Academic</div>
            <h3>University of Craiova</h3>
            <p>Joint research and curriculum development for the Open4tech Summer School program.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://scoalabritanica.ro/" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Școala Britanică">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Education</div>
              <h3>Școala Britanică</h3>
              <p>STEM programs, digital literacy workshops, and student technology projects.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card" style="position:relative;">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Digital Futures Foundation">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Community</div>
            <h3>Digital Futures Foundation</h3>
            <p>Expanding technology access to underserved communities across Romania.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>How it works</h2>
    <p class="sub">From first conversation to launch.</p>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623;">1</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:inherit;">Initial discussion</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">We explore potential collaboration areas and alignment with your goals.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623;">2</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:inherit;">Proposal development</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Together we define partnership goals, structure, and deliverables.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623;">3</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:inherit;">Agreement</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">We formalize terms, expectations, and a timeline for activities.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item" style="border-bottom:none;">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623;">4</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:inherit;">Implementation</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Launch partnership activities with ongoing management and regular reviews.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WHY PARTNER -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Why partner with us</h2>
    <p class="sub">What you bring, what you gain.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Motivated Community</h3><p>Access a network of skilled technology learners and professionals.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i><h3>Curriculum Influence</h3><p>Shape educational content to match real industry needs.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-megaphone"></i><h3>Visibility</h3><p>Reach our network of professionals, students, and partner organizations.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-puzzle"></i><h3>Real Projects</h3><p>Collaborative projects that address real-world challenges.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-award"></i><h3>CSR Support</h3><p>Meaningful initiatives for corporate social responsibility programs.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i><h3>Talent Pipeline</h3><p>Early access to trained, job-ready graduates from our programs.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOOKING FOR PARTNERS -->
<div class="m-s" id="partner" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.04); border:1.5px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:20px; padding:3.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-search" style="font-size:2.5rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1.25rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.75rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">We're looking for partners</h2>
      <p style="color:#86868b; max-width:550px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem; line-height:1.6;">We're actively expanding across the EU. If you're a school, university, company, or NGO interested in bringing chen.ist Academy programs to your community — let's talk.</p>
      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:1rem; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto 2rem; text-align:left;">
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">Romania</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">Sweden</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">Germany</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">All EU countries</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-handshake me-2"></i>Start a conversation</a>
        <a href="mailto:office@chen.ist" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-envelope me-2"></i>office@chen.ist</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Stronger together</h2>
    <p>Join our network of partners shaping the future of technology education across Europe.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Book a call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> No commitment required &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Flexible models &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Mutual benefit
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
